case_title: 57 TAYLOR I7 LP VS. JOSE SANCHEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7 LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JOSE DE LEON, VIVIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET, #228, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***APPLIES TO ANY AND ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7 LP SERVED FEB-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-20-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JOSE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7 LP AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JOSE DE LEON, VIVIAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7 LP SERVED FEB-17-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON, VIVIAN
